description_long: This is a pair of sunglasses with a bold, full-rim rectangular frame and thick temples, designed for urban wear. The frame is solid and opaque, with a glossy finish that reflects light, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The lenses are large, dark, and completely opaque, providing maximum coverage and privacy for the eyes. The bridge is integrated into the frame, forming a smooth, continuous connection between the lenses without any visible nose pads. The temples are straight and robust, tapering slightly towards the ends, and feature a subtle marking on the inner side indicating UV protection. No visible embellishments or logos are present, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian style.
description: A pair of bold, rectangular sunglasses with thick, glossy black frames and fully opaque dark lenses, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame and large, dark lenses with a solid bridge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, straight temple and the subtle inner marking.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and temples, with the bridge and lens curvature visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the robust temple and inner marking.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, straight temples and a solid, continuous bridge. The frame is bold and robust, with no visible embellishments or cutouts.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are fully opaque and black, with no visible gradient, transparency, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Integrated, solid bridge that smoothly connects the two lenses without separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick, straight, and unadorned, with a subtle marking on the inner side indicating UV protection. No decorative patterns or engravings are visible.
